name: Caraway Puffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter, cottage cheese, and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the grated lemon peel, caraway seed, and egg to the mixture. Beat with a mixer until well combined.
3. Gradually stir in the biscuit mix and milk alternately, being careful not to overmix.
4. Fill greased muffin pans about 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
